name: Pomeranian Voivodeship (Poland)

details of the griffin's claws and tongue

description: Yellow field charged with a black griffin facing the hoist.
history: Adopted by the Pomeranian Voivodeship after its creation in 1999, restoring the medieval heraldic device of Pomerelia.
